tool.name: Ingest Sample to the Lakehouse
tool.command: mkdir model && export MLFLOW_LOGGING_LEVEL=ERROR && pixi run --as-is ingest --input $input --catalog-type rest --uri $uri --warehouse $catalog --credential "\$LAKEHOUSE_USERNAME:\$LAKEHOUSE_PASSWORD" > >(tee -a $output) 2> >(tee -a $output >&2)
tool.help:
**Ingest BioSANS sample data to the NSD Data Lakehouse**
This tool publishes a BioSANS sample dataset from Galaxy to the NSD Data Lakehouse. It uses the configured Lakehouse catalog endpoint and warehouse to register the input sample data so downstream NSD workflows can discover and reuse it.
**Inputs**
- BioSANS sample data file to ingest - Lakehouse catalog URI - Lakehouse warehouse/catalog name
**Credentials**
Before running the tool, add your NSD Data Lakehouse credentials in Galaxy. The tool passes those credentials securely to the ingest command at runtime.
**Output**
The output dataset contains the ingest console log, including any catalog registration messages or errors returned by the Lakehouse ingest process.
